creator: mina3hun_at_2a03.jp@FreeBSD.org
text:
can't execute sysutil/ezjail on 9.0 BETA1.
$ ezjail-admin install

550 pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/9.0-BETA1/base: No such file or directory

Because the distribution images on 9.0-BETA1 are archived 'xz' formats.
ezjail is not supported the archived image.

How-To-Repeat: install ezjail from ports, run 'ezjail-admin install'.
